title: Braya pamirica
taxonomy: Braya pamirica is classified in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and its closest relatives in the plant kingdom. Within the Brassicaceae family, Braya pamirica is further classified in the genus Braya, which comprises several species of flowering plants. The plant is often grouped within the tribe Arabideae, a sub-group within the Brassicaceae family. By understanding its classification, researchers can better understand Braya pamirica's evolutionary history and its relationships with other plants.
